text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Good question, huh? I'm feeling...
whatevs.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's fiiine. With my effort level at rock bottom,
I've got the mental clarity I need to score an easy
victory.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like... I'll skillfully lure my opponents right into
my trap, and get handed the win.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Fortunate for us, everything's already set in
place. Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on now, Trainer. Relaaax... Just droop your
shoulders and point your peepers.
